name: core-slugify
summary: Core slugify: the single named export slugify(input: string): string lowercases and hyphenates a title (lowercase + whitespace->hyphen + edge trim + empty/nullish-coercion path). Owns predicates lower-hyphen and empty. No deps; foundation slice-02 extends.

name: punctuation-stripping
summary: Punctuation stripping: extends slice-01 so punctuation and diacritics collapse correctly (strip non-[a-z0-9], NFKD diacritics, collapse repeated hyphens) without changing the contract surface. Owns predicate strip-punct. dependsOn slice-01.
